title: World Ending
lyrics: Oh Are you thinking about me I think about yeah Was distracted and in traffic I didn't feel it when the Happened were you out drinking? We were the living room channel and it's been a year now, I think I'm figured out To let you go die You know Wait down for forever and it's fine. I know You know, we want men for each other. It's fine. But if this world You come over You love me for Fears would be irrelevant if you come over the sky be falling I hold you tight wouldn't be a reason why we even have to think of the word Goodbye If the world was ending you'd be over, right? If the world was ending you'd come over be here tonight I Try to imagine your reaction when I tell you I'm not scared that you left me before when you left me I'm sure you'd get the best of me. If you just wait the light doesn't wait for me for anything I figured out how to think about you without it Just kidding, I'm lost again in forever. It's fine Meant for any of this Minds we complicated everything and thought that we were ending before we even knew that we began You come over you state would you love me just to love me like you did? All our fears if the world was ending they would be irrelevant You come over right sky be falling. I don't you say I am Damage would even have to say goodbye if the planet was gone you'd be over, right? You come over, right? You tell me you tell me that I'm all right But I know you know, you know, you weren't down for forever and it's fine I Know that we weren't men or anything other than these designs But if the world was exploding the planet came over you were emoting You were telling me just the thing to be angry All my peers would be Just me Understand Here's the world was ending you I'm over right You love me not tonight before every night Tell me that I never have to fight for you If we all we all ended, right
